TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Bakir Izetbegovińá = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 6 jiyax 28 ka Bakir Izetbegovińá ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bosnia and herzegovina ta sayang o kiya ka Bakir Izetbegovińá, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 3 jiyax 17 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Bakir Izetbegovińá = Bakir Izetbegovińá (kari Bosna: Bakir Izetbegovińá; kngkawas 1956 idas 6 diyax 28), pa taxa Bosna Mi Hercegovina na Seyji Jnwi, laqi brah Bosna Mi Hercegovina Cusitwan Aria Icetpeykwici. Kngkawas 2010 prading ngalan Bosna Mi Hercegovina Cusitwan Dayhyo ntumal niya, saya ka Mincu Singtong Tang Tangcusi. Kndusan mi kyoiku cuxan Bakir Izetbegovińá mntuting Sarajevo, kiya mi mniq Sarajevo, muyas pyasan tutiping mi pyasan tubaraw, kngkawas 1981 u mnhdu muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Sarajevo Cyeyncu Sweyweyn. Kngkawas 1982 dhuq kngkawas 1992, Bakir Izetbegovińá mniq 1 cyeyncu csyun kongs ngalan komung. Kndusan seyji niya cuxan Bakir Izetbegovińá kngkawas 1991 dhuq kngkawas 2003 ngalan Sarajevo Canton Cyeyncu Sweyweyn Yingcyo. Bakir Izetbegovińá mniq kngkawas 2006 seyngkyo mangal Bosnia mi Herzegovina Gikay giying. Kiya mi kngkawas 2002 prading ngalan SDA dcusitwan. Kngkawas 2015 idas 5, Bakir Izetbegovińá pa spuda seyngkyo mangal Mincu Singtong Tang Cusi, rmirih Sulejman Tihińá. Soto(2010‚Äď2018) Mniq kcka kngkawas 2010 seyngkyo cida, Bakir Izetbegovińá ka sediq Bosnia u, wada mbiyax mangal Soto Bosnia Mi Herzegovina. Waycyaw cngce Kngkawas 2012 idas 6, Bakir Izetbegovińá smriq kari Soto Serbian Tomislav Nikolińá ini sruwa Srebrenica Beyhing Pnhqilan ka uuda pkngatun minjoku, niyi u wisu tmseyyax mtngari mudus niya. Kngkawas 2012 idas 10, Bakir Izetbegovińá tuhuy kana mnniq qmpah Sotohu niya msupu mniq Sarajevo mtqita dqras Amirika Kwowucing Hillary Clinton. Kngkawas 2014 idas 7, Bakir Izetbegovińá pkla kari Gaza ka "Qnbsyaqn balay ida kiya pusu bbun niya Israeli", kiya mi mdhu kari rmngawqnlangan u wisu "Luxay yahan pqrqilan Israeli". Pnluban niya Turkey Kngkawas 2016, alaw kari mi hnang Turkey, seyhu Turkey u smruwa dmuwi kari Bosnian ka ngalan dha duma sapah pyasan na slhayan sweynsyoke, kiya u pkla kari mpniq kngkawas 2018 prading smluhay. Kngkawas 2018 idas 5, mniq brah mkpiya diyax cida ka Soto Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdońüan homung Bosnia Mi Herzegovina cida, Izetbegovińá pa rmngaw: "Erdońüan kamptusa niya Muslim, kiya ka niyi ka Tuiwil pusu bay ini skuxun hiya." Seuhu Turkey pa dmayaw phiyu ndanan cida wada sliqn ka nniqan bay rikisi na Sapah Thmkuwan Cingcns kiya ka Mccbu Pohey, mray so Cingcns AladŇĺa mi Cingcns Arnaudija. Malix qpahun Soto daw (kngkawas 2018 dhuq saya) ) Bakir Izetbegovińá pa dhuq ka diyax mnhdu qpahun niya Soto daw kasi ka qulung mlatac qpahun Soto, ini qbsiyaq daw, alaw 8 knkawas ka diyax iyax qpahun Soto, kngkawas 2019 idas 2 diyax 25 cida, Bakir Izetbegovińá u wada ngalan Bosnian Mi Herzegovina kcka Jnmin Weyn uri da. Pprngawan Tunarac Hunac Oco u seymung bay mpsbuc Sntali Cuyi Mi Niqan Pnsliyan Cumi ka DŇĺevad GalijaŇ°evińá u mniq kngkawas 2011 hmili tmiyu Bakir Izetbegovińá pa dhuq ka diyax mnhdu qpahun niya Soto daw kasi ka qulung mlatac qpahun Soto, ini qbsiyaq daw, alaw 8 knkawas ka diyax iyax qpahun Soto, kngkawas 2019 idas 2 diyax 25 cida, Bakir Izetbegovińá u wada ngalan Bosnian Mi Herzegovina kcka Jnmin Weyn uri da. Dmkuh mi dmayaw Bosnian Mi Herzegovina na Wahabi Pay. Kngkawas 2019 idas 10, ana so knhbrawan hiyi sediq qnlangan ka mdakar msang quri uuda niyi, bninaw Bakir Izetbegovińá u dmkuh Turkey mquri tunarac daya Syria mcbu, kiya mi rmangaw kari "Turkey u niqan biyax qmlahang anjeyng dah mi mndungus dxral mi uuda psbalay sediq qnlqilan". Kngkawas 2020 idas 5 cida, Bakir Izetbegovińá pa wada hliyan tmiyu hiya ka "Bosnian Mi Herzegovina wisu dmudul Waya Islamkyo", so niyi u pndungus bay pnsltudan Islam na 1 Waya Snlhayan. Kndusan niya nanaq Bakir Izetbegovińá u mniq kngkawas 1983 tuhuy Sebija GrańĎevińá msturung, dhiya u niqan 1 laqi qridin Jasmina, wa mniq Sarajevo. Qridin niya ka "KCUS"- Klinińćki Centar Univerziteta Sarajevo (kari Ingkoku: University of Sarajevo Clinical Center) na Cangwu Tongs. Kngkawas 2020 idas 10 diyax 16, Bakir Izetbegovińá pa snquri COVID-19 keyngsa uptura balay runan Narux Brah Uhan, kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2021 idas 5 diyax 26 cida muda pbeytaq tu1 qumi Hweyjwey-BioNTech yimyaw.
S.PHON: = baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** ka baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan bosnia and ńß…ô…ĺ*…ôgo*ina ta sajaŇč o kija ka baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i*, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* = baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* (ka…ĺi bosna: baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i*; kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **), pa taxa bosna mi ńß…ô…ĺ ¶…ôgo*ina na s…ô…üi …ünwi, laqi b…ĺańß bosna mi ńß…ô…ĺ ¶…ôgo*ina ¶usitwan a…ĺia i ¶…ôtp…ôkwi ¶i. kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč Ňčalan bosna mi ńß…ô…ĺ ¶…ôgo*ina ¶usitwan dajńßjo ntumal nija, saja ka min ¶u siŇčtoŇč taŇč taŇč ¶usi. kndusan mi kjoiku ¶uxan baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* mntutiŇč sa…ĺa…ü…ô*o, kija mi mniq sa…ĺa…ü…ô*o, mujas pjasan tutipiŇč mi pjasan tuba…ĺaw, kŇčkawas **** u mnńßdu mujas pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč sa…ĺa…ü…ô*o ¶j…ôn ¶u sw…ôw…ôn. kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas ****, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* mniq * ¶j…ôn ¶u ¶sjun koŇčs Ňčalan komuŇč. kndusan s…ô…üi nija ¶uxan baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* kŇčkawas **** dńßuq kŇčkawas **** Ňčalan sa…ĺa…ü…ô*o ¶anton ¶j…ôn ¶u sw…ôw…ôn jiŇč ¶jo. baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* mniq kŇčkawas **** s…ôŇčkjo maŇčal bosnia mi ńß…ô…ĺ*…ôgo*ina gikaj gijiŇč. kija mi kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč Ňčalan sda d ¶usitwan. kŇčkawas **** idas *, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* pa spuda s…ôŇčkjo maŇčal min ¶u siŇčtoŇč taŇč ¶usi, …ĺmi…ĺińß sul…ô…üman tińßi*. soto(*********) mniq k ¶ka kŇčkawas **** s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* ka s…ôdiq bosnia u, wada mbijax maŇčal soto bosnia mi ńß…ô…ĺ*…ôgo*ina. waj ¶jaw ¶Ňč ¶…ô kŇčkawas **** idas *, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* sm…ĺiq ka…ĺi soto s…ô…ĺbian tomisla* nikoli* ini s…ĺuwa s…ĺ…ôb…ĺ…ôni ¶a b…ôńßiŇč pnńßqilan ka uuda pkŇčatun min…üoku, niji u wisu tms…ôjax mtŇča…ĺi mudus nija. kŇčkawas **** idas **, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* tuńßuj kana mnniq qmpańß sotońßu nija msupu mniq sa…ĺa…ü…ô*o mtqita dq…ĺas ami…ĺika kwowu ¶iŇč ńßilla…ĺj ¶linton. kŇčkawas **** idas *, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* pkla ka…ĺi ga*a ka "qnbsjaqn balaj ida kija pusu bbun nija is…ĺa…ôli", kija mi mdńßu ka…ĺi …ĺmŇčawqnlaŇčan u wisu "luxaj jańßan pq…ĺqilan is…ĺa…ôli". pnluban nija tu…ĺk…ô kŇčkawas ****, alaw ka…ĺi mi ńßnaŇč tu…ĺk…ô, s…ôńßu tu…ĺk…ô u sm…ĺuwa dmuwi ka…ĺi bosnian ka Ňčalan dńßa duma sapańß pjasan na slńßajan sw…ônsjok…ô, kija u pkla ka…ĺi mpniq kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč smluńßaj. kŇčkawas **** idas *, mniq b…ĺańß mkpija dijax ¶ida ka soto tu…ĺk…ô …ĺ…ô ¶…ôp tajjip …ô…ĺdo*an ńßomuŇč bosnia mi ńß…ô…ĺ*…ôgo*ina ¶ida, i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* pa …ĺmŇčaw: "…ô…ĺdo*an kamptusa nija muslim, kija ka niji ka tuiwil pusu baj ini skuxun ńßija." s…ôuńßu tu…ĺk…ô pa dmajaw pńßiju ndanan ¶ida wada sliqn ka nniqan baj …ĺikisi na sapańß tńßmkuwan ¶iŇč ¶ns kija ka m ¶ ¶bu pońß…ô, m…ĺaj so ¶iŇč ¶ns alad*a mi ¶iŇč ¶ns a…ĺnaudi…üa. malix qpańßun soto daw (kŇčkawas **** dńßuq saja) ) baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* pa dńßuq ka dijax mnńßdu qpańßun nija soto daw kasi ka quluŇč mlata ¶ qpańßun soto, ini qbsijaq daw, alaw * knkawas ka dijax ijax qpańßun soto, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* u wada Ňčalan bosnian mi ńß…ô…ĺ*…ôgo*ina k ¶ka …ünmin w…ôn u…ĺi da. pp…ĺŇčawan tuna…ĺa ¶ ńßuna ¶ o ¶o u s…ômuŇč baj mpsbu ¶ sntali ¶uji mi niqan pnslijan ¶umi ka d*…ô*ad gali…üa*…ô*i* u mniq kŇčkawas **** ńßmili tmiju baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* pa dńßuq ka dijax mnńßdu qpańßun nija soto daw kasi ka quluŇč mlata ¶ qpańßun soto, ini qbsijaq daw, alaw * knkawas ka dijax ijax qpańßun soto, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* u wada Ňčalan bosnian mi ńß…ô…ĺ*…ôgo*ina k ¶ka …ünmin w…ôn u…ĺi da. dmkuńß mi dmajaw bosnian mi ńß…ô…ĺ*…ôgo*ina na wańßabi paj. kŇčkawas **** idas **, ana so knńßb…ĺawan ńßiji s…ôdiq qnlaŇčan ka mdaka…ĺ msaŇč qu…ĺi uuda niji, bninaw baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* u dmkuńß tu…ĺk…ô mqu…ĺi tuna…ĺa ¶ daja sj…ĺia m ¶bu, kija mi …ĺmaŇčaw ka…ĺi "tu…ĺk…ô u niqan bijax qmlańßaŇč an…ü…ôŇč dańß mi mnduŇčus dx…ĺal mi uuda psbalaj s…ôdiq qnlqilan". kŇčkawas **** idas * ¶ida, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* pa wada ńßlijan tmiju ńßija ka "bosnian mi ńß…ô…ĺ*…ôgo*ina wisu dmudul waja islamkjo", so niji u pnduŇčus baj pnsltudan islam na * waja snlńßajan. kndusan nija nanaq baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* u mniq kŇčkawas **** tuńßuj s…ôbi…üa g…ĺa*…ô*i* mstu…ĺuŇč, dńßija u niqan * laqi q…ĺidin …üasmina, wa mniq sa…ĺa…ü…ô*o. q…ĺidin nija ka "k ¶us"- klini*ki ¶…ônta…ĺ uni*…ô…ĺ*it…ôta sa…ĺa…ü…ô*o (ka…ĺi iŇčkoku: uni*…ô…ĺsitj o* sa…ĺa…ü…ô*o ¶lini ¶al ¶…ônt…ô…ĺ) na ¶aŇčwu toŇčs. kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax **, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* pa snqu…ĺi ¶o*id-** k…ôŇčsa uptu…ĺa balaj …ĺunan na…ĺux b…ĺańß uńßan, kija mi mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax ** ¶ida muda pb…ôtaq tu* qumi ńßw…ô…üw…ô-biont…ô ¶ńß jimjaw.
S.FORM: = Bakir Izetbegovińá = Mntucing hngkawas 1956 idas 6 jiyax 28 ka Bakir Izetbegovińá ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Bosnia and herzegovina ta sayang o kiya ka Bakir Izetbegovińá, pnaah hngkawas 2016 idas 3 jiyax 17 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Bakir Izetbegovińá = Bakir Izetbegovińá (kari Bosna: Bakir Izetbegovińá; kngkawas 1956 idas 6 diyax 28), pa taxa Bosna Mi Hercegovina na Seyji Jnwi, laqi brah Bosna Mi Hercegovina Cusitwan Aria Icetpeykwici. Kngkawas 2010 prading ngalan Bosna Mi Hercegovina Cusitwan Dayhyo ntumal niya, saya ka Mincu Singtong Tang Tangcusi. Kndusan mi kyoiku cuxan Bakir Izetbegovińá mntuting Sarajevo, kiya mi mniq Sarajevo, muyas pyasan tutiping mi pyasan tubaraw, kngkawas 1981 u mnhdu muyas Pyasan Tubeyhing Sarajevo Cyeyncu Sweyweyn. Kngkawas 1982 dhuq kngkawas 1992, Bakir Izetbegovińá mniq 1 cyeyncu csyun kongs ngalan komung. Kndusan seyji niya cuxan Bakir Izetbegovińá kngkawas 1991 dhuq kngkawas 2003 ngalan Sarajevo Canton Cyeyncu Sweyweyn Yingcyo. Bakir Izetbegovińá mniq kngkawas 2006 seyngkyo mangal Bosnia mi Herzegovina Gikay giying. Kiya mi kngkawas 2002 prading ngalan SDA dcusitwan. Kngkawas 2015 idas 5, Bakir Izetbegovińá pa spuda seyngkyo mangal Mincu Singtong Tang Cusi, rmirih Sulejman Tihińá. Soto(2010‚Äď2018) Mniq kcka kngkawas 2010 seyngkyo cida, Bakir Izetbegovińá ka sediq Bosnia u, wada mbiyax mangal Soto Bosnia Mi Herzegovina. Waycyaw cngce Kngkawas 2012 idas 6, Bakir Izetbegovińá smriq kari Soto Serbian Tomislav Nikolińá ini sruwa Srebrenica Beyhing Pnhqilan ka uuda pkngatun minjoku, niyi u wisu tmseyyax mtngari mudus niya. Kngkawas 2012 idas 10, Bakir Izetbegovińá tuhuy kana mnniq qmpah Sotohu niya msupu mniq Sarajevo mtqita dqras Amirika Kwowucing Hillary Clinton. Kngkawas 2014 idas 7, Bakir Izetbegovińá pkla kari Gaza ka "Qnbsyaqn balay ida kiya pusu bbun niya Israeli", kiya mi mdhu kari rmngawqnlangan u wisu "Luxay yahan pqrqilan Israeli". Pnluban niya Turkey Kngkawas 2016, alaw kari mi hnang Turkey, seyhu Turkey u smruwa dmuwi kari Bosnian ka ngalan dha duma sapah pyasan na slhayan sweynsyoke, kiya u pkla kari mpniq kngkawas 2018 prading smluhay. Kngkawas 2018 idas 5, mniq brah mkpiya diyax cida ka Soto Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdońüan homung Bosnia Mi Herzegovina cida, Izetbegovińá pa rmngaw: "Erdońüan kamptusa niya Muslim, kiya ka niyi ka Tuiwil pusu bay ini skuxun hiya." Seuhu Turkey pa dmayaw phiyu ndanan cida wada sliqn ka nniqan bay rikisi na Sapah Thmkuwan Cingcns kiya ka Mccbu Pohey, mray so Cingcns AladŇĺa mi Cingcns Arnaudija. Malix qpahun Soto daw (kngkawas 2018 dhuq saya) ) Bakir Izetbegovińá pa dhuq ka diyax mnhdu qpahun niya Soto daw kasi ka qulung mlatac qpahun Soto, ini qbsiyaq daw, alaw 8 knkawas ka diyax iyax qpahun Soto, kngkawas 2019 idas 2 diyax 25 cida, Bakir Izetbegovińá u wada ngalan Bosnian Mi Herzegovina kcka Jnmin Weyn uri da. Pprngawan Tunarac Hunac Oco u seymung bay mpsbuc Sntali Cuyi Mi Niqan Pnsliyan Cumi ka DŇĺevad GalijaŇ°evińá u mniq kngkawas 2011 hmili tmiyu Bakir Izetbegovińá pa dhuq ka diyax mnhdu qpahun niya Soto daw kasi ka qulung mlatac qpahun Soto, ini qbsiyaq daw, alaw 8 knkawas ka diyax iyax qpahun Soto, kngkawas 2019 idas 2 diyax 25 cida, Bakir Izetbegovińá u wada ngalan Bosnian Mi Herzegovina kcka Jnmin Weyn uri da. Dmkuh mi dmayaw Bosnian Mi Herzegovina na Wahabi Pay. Kngkawas 2019 idas 10, ana so knhbrawan hiyi sediq qnlangan ka mdakar msang quri uuda niyi, bninaw Bakir Izetbegovińá u dmkuh Turkey mquri tunarac daya Syria mcbu, kiya mi rmangaw kari "Turkey u niqan biyax qmlahang anjeyng dah mi mndungus dxral mi uuda psbalay sediq qnlqilan". Kngkawas 2020 idas 5 cida, Bakir Izetbegovińá pa wada hliyan tmiyu hiya ka "Bosnian Mi Herzegovina wisu dmudul Waya Islamkyo", so niyi u pndungus bay pnsltudan Islam na 1 Waya Snlhayan. Kndusan niya nanaq Bakir Izetbegovińá u mniq kngkawas 1983 tuhuy Sebija GrańĎevińá msturung, dhiya u niqan 1 laqi qridin Jasmina, wa mniq Sarajevo. Qridin niya ka "KCUS"- Klinińćki Centar Univerziteta Sarajevo (kari Ingkoku: University of Sarajevo Clinical Center) na Cangwu Tongs. Kngkawas 2020 idas 10 diyax 16, Bakir Izetbegovińá pa snquri COVID-19 keyngsa uptura balay runan Narux Brah Uhan, kiya mi mniq kngkawas 2021 idas 5 diyax 26 cida muda pbeytaq tu1 qumi Hweyjwey-BioNTech yimyaw.

¶ka kŇčkawas **** s…ôŇčkjo ¶ida, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* ka s…ôdiq bosnia u, wada mbijax maŇčal soto bosnia mi ńß…ô…ĺ*…ôgo*ina. waj ¶jaw ¶Ňč ¶…ô kŇčkawas **** idas *, baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* sm…ĺiq ka…ĺi bbun nija is…ĺa…ôli", kija mi mdńßu ka…ĺi …ĺmŇčawqnlaŇčan u wisu "luxaj jańßan pq…ĺqilan is…ĺa…ôli". pnluban nija tu…ĺk…ô kŇčkawas ****, alaw ka…ĺi mi ńßnaŇč tu…ĺk…ô, s…ôńßu tu…ĺk…ô u sm…ĺuwa dmuwi ka…ĺi bosnian ka Ňčalan dńßa duma sapańß pjasan na slńßajan sw…ônsjok…ô, kija u pkla ka…ĺi mpniq kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč smluńßaj. kŇčkawas **** idas *, mniq b…ĺańß mkpija dijax ¶ida ka soto tu…ĺk…ô …ĺ…ô ¶…ôp tajjip …ô…ĺdo*an ńßomuŇč bosnia mi ńß…ô…ĺ*…ôgo*ina ¶ida, i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* pa …ĺmŇčaw: "…ô…ĺdo*an kamptusa nija muslim, kija ka niji ka tuiwil pusu baj ini skuxun ńßija." s…ôuńßu tu…ĺk…ô pa dmajaw pńßiju ndanan ¶ida wada sliqn ka nniqan baj …ĺikisi na sapańß tńßmkuwan ¶iŇč ¶ns kija ka m ¶ ¶bu pońß…ô, m…ĺaj so ¶iŇč ¶ns alad*a mi ¶iŇč ¶ns a…ĺnaudi…üa. malix qpańßun soto daw (kŇčkawas **** dńßuq saja) ) baki…ĺ i*…ôtb…ôgo*i* pa dńßuq ka dijax mnńßdu qpańßun nija soto daw kasi ka quluŇč mlata ¶ qpańßun soto, ini qbsijaq daw, alaw * knkawas ka dijax ijax qpańßun soto, kŇčkawas **** idas *
